scripts.demo:db:migrate: sh -c 'if [ ! -f apps/demo-backend/.env ]; then echo "apps/demo-backend/.env not found. Copy apps/demo-backend/.env.example first."; exit 1; fi; set -a; . apps/demo-backend/.env; set +a; pnpm -C packages/nest prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && pnpm -C packages/nest prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma --name init'
